apps_script.setup_required: Sam or commissary.team opens editor and runs setup() ONCE to install triggers
apps_script.phase7_required: Sam or commissary.team selects s210_rebuildSupplierForm -> Run ONCE to create the supplier SI upload form with native file upload button

si_upload_form.reason_deleted: Old form asked suppliers to paste Drive link in a text field — bad UX. Phase 7 rebuild creates form with native file upload button.
si_upload_form.new_form_creation_method: Apps Script FormApp via s210_rebuildSupplierForm helper

sheet_a_external_editor_3md.note: Add Martin (3MD) email once Ian confirms contact

sheet_b_external_editor_pinnacle.note: Pinnacle still on Viber; Jay coordinates migration to sheet editor access

setup_trigger_installation.action: Open Apps Script editor and run setup() ONCE

phase7_form_rebuild_click.why_manual: Service account DWD does not include script.deployments scope; scripts.run blocked

schema_changes_phase_7.reason: CEO directive 2026-04-20: 3PLs will not paste image/drive links in spreadsheets
schema_changes_phase_7.gs_col_constants: shifted -2 for post-SI-Number cols; removed COL_SI_PHOTO + COL_DELIVERY_PHOTO
schema_changes_phase_7.consolidated_schema_unchanged: Still 22 cols; handler writes empty strings into SI Photo + Delivery Photo positions

known_limitations: Service account cannot create Apps Script API-executable deployments; scripts.run blocked without publisher-approved deployment
Forms REST API does not support file_upload question creation; Apps Script FormApp does — hence the one-click helper approach
Service account cannot access Chat API spaces directly; Apps Script runtime uses user-scoped OAuth token when script runs

e2e_results.post_phase7_e2e_status: PENDING until supplier form rebuild click
